creator: graudeejs@yandex.ru
text:
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/amd64/ISO-IMAGES/ doesn't contain 9.0 and 9.1

Instead 9.0 and 9.1 are in ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/amd64/amd64/ISO-IMAGES/ (note the extra amd64)

Same applies to release txz archives. They are in ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/amd64/amd64/ and not in ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/amd64/ as they should be.


I just checked other arch, and this but replies as well.
So is this a bug or intentional change? If it was intentioned change, then I don't see the logic for this move.

P.S.
This problem was around since release of 9.0
